name: valid_false_from_external_body_chain
code:
proof fn phi_5_valid_false_from_external_body_chain(p: TempPred<int>, q: TempPred<int>)
    requires
        valid(p),
        p.entails(q),
        q.entails(p),
        p != q,
    ensures
        false,
{
    temp_pred_equality::<int>(p, q);
}
reason: if any two mutually-entailing TempPreds are structurally distinct (p != q), temp_pred_equality forces p == q creating a contradiction — this means the axiom implicitly asserts no two distinct closures can be extensionally equivalent, which is false in general
